name: Execution Layer & Integration Agent (Decision PPO + Execution Separation)
summary: Delivered clean Decision/Execution separation for autonomous trading. Full production-grade implementation: TradeDecision spec, ExecutionAgent, MQL5 command bridge, rich feedback, paper harness integration, zero-touch watcher/supervisor arming, comprehensive docs. Zero breakage to legacy paths. 2026-05-28 FINALIZATION: Pure Python (OrderManager+MT5Executor, bridge=False via MQL5_BRIDGE_ENABLED=0) declared PRIMARY for Windows+MT5 direct (simpler, reliable, full rich features + telemetry to PPO). MQL5 optional high-perf. One-command switch documented+implemented. Hardened fallback+OrderManager registration. End-to-end tested. Ambiguity removed.

deliverables.core_agent: Python/execution/execution_agent.py (MQL5 bridge writer + OrderManager fallback + reports)
deliverables.integration: scripts/handoff_watcher.py (armed marker), paper harness (pre-wired + reinforced), router compat, __init__ exports

key_properties.primary_backend: Pure Python (OrderManager + MT5Executor via ExecutionAgent mql5_bridge_enabled=False) -- RECOMMENDED for Windows + running MT5 terminal (direct, simple, reliable, full rich TradeDecision support + immediate PPO telemetry)
key_properties.optional_bridge: MQL5 ChainGambler (set MQL5_BRIDGE_ENABLED=1 for native CTrade low-latency; full JSON TradeDecision commands written)
key_properties.force_switch: One-command: $env:MQL5_BRIDGE_ENABLED="0" (pure primary) or "1" (MQL5). Env honored in ExecutionAgent, harness, supervisor, watcher defaults updated.
key_properties.reporting: decision_id-keyed JSONL + per-decision snapshots (runtime/execution_reports/) + agent_status/decision_ppo_execution_live.json for PPO learning
key_properties.arming: Fully integrated with handoff_watcher + supervisor + promoter (zero-touch under existing env gates)
key_properties.compatibility: 100% legacy intent paths preserved via from_simple_intent + adapters

next_steps_recommended: First real post-fix candidate: verify decision_execution_armed.json + ExecutionAgent telemetry in paper (pure primary path)
MQL5 EA optional: deploy via deploy_mql5... only when MQL5_BRIDGE_ENABLED=1 desired for perf
Evolve PPO head to emit full TradeDecision (instead of 6-dim vector)
Expand OrderManager registration for per-decision advanced trailing/ladders (core already hardened for primary pure path)
